prompt: Show a paper receipt being scanned and transformed into a clean expense table interface for a website hero loop.
scene: minimal product-demo environment with a soft off-white to warm gray gradient background, subtle depth, no people
subject: one centered receipt card on the left and one clean rounded dashboard table card on the right
action: beat 1 (0-2s) the receipt floats gently while a teal scan line travels from top to bottom; beat 2 (2-4s) key receipt details convert into neat rows and columns inside the table card, with category pills and amount cells appearing in sequence
camera: straight-on product shot, locked-off framing, very subtle push-in, no rotation
lighting: polished SaaS hero animation, soft studio light, calm and confident
palette: off-white, warm gray, charcoal, teal, soft mint
style: premium motion design, crisp UI mockup, clean vector-like surfaces, subtle 3D depth, designed for a seamless website loop
timing: smooth 4 second loop; motion should feel readable and deliberate; final frame should closely match the opening composition for looping
constraints: no people; no hands; no logos; no browser chrome; no phone frame; keep the interface simple and legible; use short believable pseudo-UI labels only if needed; emphasize the transformation from raw receipt to structured accounting table
negative: flicker, jitter, fast motion, messy typography, crowded interface, dramatic camera moves, photoreal human elements

prompt: A clean motion-design hero clip where a scanned receipt becomes an organized review table.
scene: bright neutral background with soft shadows and subtle gradient atmosphere
subject: a floating receipt card centered above a structured table panel
action: beat 1 (0-2s) a luminous teal scan bar sweeps down the receipt; beat 2 (2-4s) receipt lines break apart into animated chips that settle into table rows with amounts aligned on the right
lighting: soft studio lighting, modern and premium
style: refined motion graphics for a fintech SaaS landing page, minimal and loopable
timing: 4 seconds total, two clear beats, elegant pacing, loop-friendly end state
constraints: no people, no hands, no logos, minimal text, clear structure, readable spacing
negative: flicker, illegible text, clutter, aggressive motion, photoreal scene noise
